title: limonium ionicum
intro: Limonium ionicum, also known as sea lavender, is a flowering plant native to the Ionian Islands in Greece. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which provide a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Limonium ionicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
